meta.intent: Give the player a recovery spectacle where clean dock discipline enables an emotionally legible hero rescue.
meta.expectedPath: Use the satisfying lower dock-safe route clear to free the hero puppy, then take the compact upper route to rescue the secondary puppy.
meta.expectedFailMode: Wrong play should mostly be inefficient; repeated broad clears can still create dock pressure but should not feel like a punishment spike.
meta.whatItProves: Dock discipline can create relief and payoff, not only failure avoidance.
meta.notes: Role: spectacle. Full visual occupancy is intentional after the L18 exam: the generous groups create a readable relief board while repeated broad clears can still create dock trouble. The level stays dense without adding new mechanics or layout shortcuts.
